text_block_list.text:
The summer training camp, through which training had been 
progressing smoothly, was coming to an end.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: I will excuse myself here then, good work.

As was always the case, Admire Groove wasted no time 
nor words after training and walked off.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Hagh… hahh… haah… pheeew… No, I can't stop here. This isn't enough. I can do more…!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have to put all my effort, all my strength and energy, solely 
into running…! So that I may never lose… to anyone!

All I want is to support her, and the way she so wholeheartedly 
plunges herself into running. Even if she won't accept me 
by her side, I wish there was another way I could help.

text_block_list.name: Similarly-Aged Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You could try doing something nice for her, maybe? 
Granted, all that comes to mind are things like taking 
her out for a meal or a bit of fun and relaxation…

text_block_list.name: Similarly-Aged Trainer
text_block_list.text: I… can't see Admire Groove be interested in that.
choice_data_list: I must agree with you there…

text_block_list.text:
I knew what my colleagues' replies would be before asking. 
A bit of a wry smile creeps onto my face as I unintentionally 
word my agreement much too stiffly.

Food, entertainment, gifts… Nothing I can think of sounds 
like anything Admire Groove would particularly care for.

If it's only to fool myself into feeling helpful, I better not. 
It doesn't need to be much. Just anything that might make her 
look back on summer camp thinking it had been a good time.

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof!!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Hahh hahh haah… haaah… phoooo…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Just a… quick break… haah. Then more… more running…
Hey, hey! Slow down a bit, will you!

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Wuff! Woof woof!

text_block_list.name: Woman Wearing a Hat
text_block_list.text: Yes yesh, you want to run around, don't you. I'm sorry I can't let you ow… right now because of my back… ow-oww…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(Isn't that dog… one of those clever breeds? Why does it look 
like it's eyeing its owner's face… as if awaiting a command.)

text_block_list.name: Woman Wearing a Hat
text_block_list.text: Yeees, I know you need a lot of movement～ You doo, yes, and you're not getting nearly enough now～

text_block_list.name: Woman Wearing a Hat
text_block_list.text: All because I can't run anymore… Aaah, we are in a pickle… Oh no!? I accidentally let go of the leash!

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof!!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: You… wha—!? Ah…!

Admire Groove instinctively lunges for 
the leash, but her hands find only air.

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Hahh haah hahh…!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Wa— Wait up…! Hey, stop!

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Wo-woof!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Why do you look so happy… ughh!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(If I grab the leash like this, it'll yank his neck badly…! I'd have 
to bend down for that anyway, and lose too much speed…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (Then I'll just have to run ahead of it!)

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Huff huff huff!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …He sped up again! Hey, we're not playing a game! Haah… Stop wagging your tail around!

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Wa-oooof!!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…There's something nostalgic… almost joyful… 
about this frantic running around.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(No, I'm only chasing this dog because circumstance 
forced me… aaagh but… but…!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Hagh hahh… haaah… Gosh, you little…

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Woon… huff huff huff…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Say what now? I'm faster than you, you know? 
We were only together because I was matching your pace.

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Wo-woof!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Is that an objection I hear?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Well, come on, we're going back. 
You have… a family waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Wuff wuff!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Ah, hey! Gosh… don't jump at me! Ahaha— wahh!

text_block_list.name: Boarding House Caretaker
text_block_list.text: I'm glad things worked out well last night～
choice_data_list: For sure, thank you for the help.

text_block_list.name: Boarding House Caretaker
text_block_list.text: Hm-hmm. Oh, it's nothing. Nobody's out that late, and if you did run into anyone, almost everyone knows my boy 'round here.

text_block_list.name: Boarding House Caretaker
text_block_list.text: I was a little taken aback when you turned up with a request like that, of course, but you're a good, caring trainer, aren't you!

text_block_list.name: Boarding House Caretaker
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, aw, nothing to be embarrassed about! 
Oh, by the way… what'd you think of my performance, eh? 
Pretty goo— Ah, I better go!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …? Was that…?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(…She looked a lot like that lady from last night. 
Her voice too… Perhaps I'm just imagining it?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: (Last night…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Huh!? Yes… wha— What do you want…?

She won't let it show on her face, nor speak it 
out loud, but all the same, I can feel the gentler 
air that envelops her now.
choice_data_list: <size=34>…Let's continue our hard work when we get back!</size>

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: ……Again, you…

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …You really never have a lesson hard enough.
